name: Buckler
notes: Hand remains free while wielding; favored by duelists

name: Small Shield
notes: Light, round or oval, strapped to arm

name: Large Shield
notes: -5 ft speed; covers most of the body

name: Tower Shield
notes: -10 ft speed; can deploy for 3/4 cover; one-handed ranged weapon usable behind it

name: Aspis
notes: +1 AC when adjacent to shield-wielding ally

name: Throwing Shield
notes: Can be thrown as weapon (see Weapons table)

name: Pavise
notes: Can deploy for 3/4 cover; half AC bonus when not deployed

name: Bouche Shield
notes: +1 attack and +1d4 damage with lance while mounted

name: Targe
notes: Bonus action shield bash: 1d4 piercing (material damage bonus halved)
